text:
latex port fails to "make" properly:

% make

l.56 ...ame OMX/cmex/m/n/10\endcsname=cmex10\relax
                                                  
? 
! Emergency stop.
<to be read again> 
                   \relax 
l.56 ...ame OMX/cmex/m/n/10\endcsname=cmex10\relax
                                                  
No pages of output.
Transcript written on latex.log.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/latex.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/latex.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/latex.

Fix: 

Fix the port.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/print/latex
make
